Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Assumptions Methodology 1 Case Identification order_id is used as the unique Case ID 2 Activity Derivation Order Created Derived from the Orders table Items Picked Derived from the Order Lines table each line item generates a distinct event Order Dispatched Derived from the Delivery table delivery_dispatch_date Order Arrived delivery_arrival_date Invoice Issued Derived from the Invoice table invoice_issue_date Payment Received Derived from the Payments table payment_date 3 Resource Mapping sales_person_id picker_id carrier_id billing_person_id to Resources table 4 Chronological Ordering Events sorted by Timestamp within each Case ID 5 Data Completeness All rows from all relevant tables included
